subcodes.first_line: O peerless sapling of the garden of the love of God! Thy letter was received and its contents were noted and understood. With humble entreaty and supplication [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال بیهمال حدیقه محبت الله نامه آنجناب واصل و مفهوم و معلوم گردید تضرع و ابتهال
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @personal instructions
